title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of retrieval quality blockers that affect memory reference in the Codex-only clo
summary: Completed read-only audit of retrieval quality blockers for Codex-only memory reference. Findings: current Context Pack path is honestly labeled lexical_fallback_v2, but there is no hard gate preventing memory-reference quality claims while dense vectors/wiki SQLite are absent; eval:context is bootstrap/noise-tolerant and not representative enough to prove memory quality; broad accepted behavior rules and auto-growth summaries can dominate focused packs; os_gate validates context presence and safety risk but not retrieval mode, index freshness, noise, provenance, real-vault behavior evaluation, or candidate-count budgets. No source files were edited.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Completed read-only audit of retrieval quality blockers for Codex-only memory reference. Findings: current Context Pack path is honestly labeled lexical_fallback_v2, but there is no hard gate preventing memory-reference quality claims while dense vectors/wiki SQLite are absent; eval:context is bootstrap/noise-tolerant and not representative enough to prove memory quality; broad accepted behavior rules and auto-growth summaries can dominate focused packs; os_gate validates context presence and safety risk but not retrieval mode, index freshness, noise, provenance, real-vault behavior evaluation
request: Read-only audit of retrieval quality blockers that affect memory reference in the Codex-only closed loop, focused on eval:context failure/noise, lexical_fallback_v2, and minimum hard gates before claiming memory reference quality. Do not edit files.
decisions: Do not claim lexical_fallback_v2 is real dense hybrid retrieval or sufficient memory-reference quality.
Treat current eval:context as coarse retrieval smoke coverage, not a hard quality gate.

Minimum quality claims need hard gates for retrieval mode, index/shard freshness, representative context eval, behavior eval, provenance/source distinction, noise/type budgets, and observable memory use.
next_steps: Create/refesh real wiki SQLite and dense-vector provider/index evidence before using hybrid_contextual_v2 language.
Replace bootstrap context-golden README routing cases with representative semantic, provenance, negative, quarantine, recency, noisy-growth, and public-safety cases.

Add os_gate or verification-registry hard failures for lexical fallback when hybrid quality is claimed, missing/stale wiki index or SQLite shards, eval:context failures/noise, missing behavior-golden, and behavior-rule swamping.
